description: Phase 0.3 regex denylist — terms that commonly propagate as hallucinations in generated clip metadata when the transcript / chat / OCR never mentioned them. A term here only fails a claim when the same term is ABSENT from all references (transcript window, overlay OCR, chat). Compiled with re.IGNORECASE; patterns use Python regex with word-boundary anchors.

platform_meta_tics.description: Generic YouTube/TikTok creator CTAs that don't belong in a clip title

twitch_jargon_overclaims.description: Twitch-specific events that MUST be backed by transcript or EventSub ground truth — this is the 'gifted subs' failure mode from ClippingResearch.md

generic_creator_templates.description: Filler phrases that usually mean the model is pattern-matching against training data, not the clip

sports_highlight_tropes.description: Overused sports/esports clichés the model reaches for when it doesn't have real HUD OCR
